meaning: adj.文字的,照字面上的,无夸张的
examples: The literal meaning of 'petrify' is 'turn to stone'.
I am not referring to 'small' people in the literal sense of the word.
It is a word-by-word literal translation of the Chinese greetings.
In one very literal fell swoop he dispatches half his armies to the north.
Well, I mean the literal translation, veni, veni, venias - come, come, oh come.
